body:
# Note
This release includes major refactors to improve state management and move shared code across my apps to reusable modules/libraries. Issues are expected, you can report them on [Issues](https://github.com/aliernfrog/lac-tool/issues) or on [Discord](https://aliernfrog.github.io/discord).

### ✨ New Features
- [`321ded5`](https://github.com/aliernfrog/lac-tool/commit/321ded5e7298afbeeb6792f0fba87ca53c975ffd) - Fix crash when merging maps on scoped storage, add crash handler, support links, better changelog viewer and improve update control system *(PR #136 by @aliernfrog)*
- [`3dddac9`](https://github.com/aliernfrog/lac-tool/commit/3dddac9a287093ac4e488811e7309b0543b9b0f6) - Add tooltips to all icon buttons *(PR #137 by @aliernfrog)*
- [`901e817`](https://github.com/aliernfrog/lac-tool/commit/901e817c5ffa8aaba5c86f00808dc9d18c4d95c5) - **l10n**: Update translations *(PR #135 by @aliernfrog)*

### ♻️ Refactors
- [`88cca66`](https://github.com/aliernfrog/lac-tool/commit/88cca66813375838c3331ce99f3e7413deaa0806) - Use shared module from `aliernfrog/pf-tool` to avoid duplicate code *(PR #131 by @aliernfrog)*
